case_title: IVANA BRAJKOVIC VS. ANGEL OSMIN CEDENO MADRANO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MADRANO, ANGEL OSMIN CEDENO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,675.00 FILED BY BRAJKOVIC, IVANA AS TO DEFENDANT MADRANO, ANGEL OSMIN CEDENO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAJKOVIC, IVANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADRANO, ANGEL OSMIN CEDENO $6,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IVANA BRAJKOVIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGEL OSMIN CEDENO MARANO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
